title: Alex Jones Getting Drunk & Painting Rocks [INTERVIEW]
summary: Jesse Michels interviews Alex Jones in an informal setting involving drinking tequila and painting rocks. The conversation covers Jones's anti-elitist philosophy, his infiltration of Bohemian Grove, his relationship with Joe Rogan, media censorship, conspiracy theories, parapsychology, and his views on science and spirituality.

events.description: Alex Jones infiltrated the Bohemian Grove and witnessed the Cremation of Care ritual
Alex Jones predicted on air in July that the government would blow up the World Trade Center and blame Bin Laden

key_claims.claim: Jones infiltrated Bohemian Grove in 2000 and witnessed a pagan ritual called the Cremation of Care, which he describes as satanic
Jones publicly warned in July 2001 that the government would attack the World Trade Center and blame Bin Laden
QAnon is a disinformation operation and not legitimate
Joe Rogan has infrastructure ready to launch his own independent platform with hundreds of creators if censored by Spotify
The observer effect in quantum physics demonstrates that human observation fundamentally changes reality
Only about 5% of observable reality is regular matter, with 95% being dark matter and dark energy
Early scientists like Francis Bacon and Isaac Newton were deeply involved in alchemy alongside their scientific work
